# architecture.md — Agent Map & Module Boundaries
# Generated by ArchitectureAgent. This is the structural contract for all agents.

## Agent map

| Layer | Agent(s) | Reads from | Writes to |
|-------|----------|------------|-----------|
| 0 | — (policy files) | — | policies/ via PR only |
| 1 | Specialist agents | policies/, docs/ | decision_log |
| 2 | Orchestrator | Layer 1 outputs | conflict_log, decision_log |
| 3 | Output agents | Layer 2 output | final artifacts |

## Module boundaries

<!-- FILL IN: What does each module own? What are its public interfaces? -->

## Layer rules (enforced by StructuralLinter in CI)

1. Layer 1 agents may NOT import from each other.
2. All cross-agent communication goes through Layer 2 (Orchestrator).
3. No agent may write to policies/ at runtime. Policy changes go through PRs.
4. All agent inputs must pass SchemaValidator before any LLM call.
5. All deterministic policy rules must pass PolicyLinter before any LLM call.
